title: On Nilpotent Residuals of Sylow Normalizers of a Finite Group
abstract:
Abstract
          A positive answer is obtained to the question posed in the paper by T.I. Vasil’eva and A.G. Koranchuk,
“Finite groups with subnormal residuals of Sylow normalizers,” Sib. Math. J., vol. 63, no. 4, 670–676 (2022).
